data.title: Credit Key raises $90 million to expand B2B payments platform
data.description: It plans to use the new funding to expand its U.S. merchant base, strengthen platform partnerships and add features that integrate with existing ecommerce and sales systems.

data.title: Amazon adds Health AI assistant to One Medical
data.description: The agentic AI tool, which Amazon calls Health AI, is now available to One Medical members following a beta launch in early 2025.

data.title: Brunello Cucinelli launches a new AI-powered ecommerce site
data.description: The Solomeo-built site now offers a field for customer prompts, such as inquiries about products that may fit specific contexts and needs.

data.title: Temu challenges Amazon's cross-border ecommerce market share in 2025
data.description: IPC data indicates that Temu increased its share of cross-border ecommerce sales to 24% in 2025. That's an increase from less than 1% in 2022, before it ran a Super Bowl add in February 2023 that expanded its brand awareness in the United States.

data.title: Forrester: B2B buying groups expand as they question AI
data.description: When a purchase includes generative AI features — which often require additional evaluation and cross-functional input — the buying group doubles in size compared with purchases that do not include such features.
